articles.title: Official Weigh-In Results | UFC Perth - UFC.com
articles.description: The Official Weights Of The Athletes Competing May 2, 2026 At UFC Fight Night: Della Maddalena vs Prates In Australia
articles.content: UFC action goes down on Saturday night as Perth's Jack Della Maddalena looks to get back into welterweight title contention as he defends home turf against the all-action knockout artist Carlos Prate… [+1620 chars]
